subcodes.first_line: O divine herald! Your letter was received, as well as the other letter enclosed therein. Praise be to God for these glad-tidings [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بشیرالهی نامه شما رسید و همچنین نامه دیگر که در جوف بود الحمد لله بشارت
subcodes.subjects: @permission for visit; pilgrimage, @business; financial; property matters
